suite.name: Epic3 Selenium Demo

kw.name: Demo Suite Init
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Run seed script and load test data IDs

test.name: Demo-1 Passenger Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Passenger logs in via the web UI

test.name: Demo-2 Passenger Views Review Page

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Wait for reviews page to load
kw.arg: Wait for reviews page to load
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รีวิว'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Passenger navigates to /reviews to see pending reviews

test.name: Demo-3 Passenger Creates Review

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: The element 'xpath=(//button[contains(@class,'cursor-pointer')])[5]' should be visible, but it is not.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: The element 'xpath=(//button[contains(@class,'cursor-pointer')])[5]' should be visible, but it is not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Show 5th star selected with container selector
kw.arg: Show 5th star selected with container selector
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: var buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button'); var starButtons = []; for(var i = 0; i < buttons.length; i++) { if(buttons[i].getAttribute('class') && buttons[i].getAttribute('class').includes('cursor-pointer')) { starButtons.push(buttons[i]); } } if(starButtons.length >= 5) { starButtons[4].click(); }
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.arg: Show star selected with JavaScript fallback
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'สุภาพ') or contains(text(),'polite') or contains(text(),'ขับปลอดภัย')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ตรงเวลา') or contains(text(),'on_time') or contains(text(),'รถสะอาด')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'บริการดีมาก คนขับสุภาพ ขับปลอดภัย แนะนำครับ' into text field '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="e417bedee1efac762ad0c8750a15324c", element="f.4912947FE0877C762642483E48CC756F.d.52429E1DCC5D5152A568BC91837DBAD8.e.75")>'.
kw.arg: บริการดีมาก คนขับสุภาพ ขับปลอดภัย แนะนำครับ
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ส่งรีวิว') or contains(text(),'Submit')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Wait for submit and show result
kw.arg: Wait for submit and show result
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Passenger clicks to create a review for a completed booking

test.name: Demo-4 Passenger Sees Submitted Review

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Let viewer see the submitted review
kw.arg: Let viewer see the submitted review
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: After submitting, passenger sees the review in their list

test.name: Demo-10 Admin Resolves a Dispute

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ซ่อนรีวิว') or contains(text(),'Resolve') or contains(text(),'✅')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.name: Demo-12 Final Summary Screenshot

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Take final screenshots showing the completed demo

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Epic 3 — Selenium Browser Demo: Review & Rating System Visual demonstration of the review UI flow in Chrome browser. Covers: Passenger creates review, Driver views reviews, Driver creates dispute, Admin manages disputes.
